statement: There are approximately 15,000 to 16,000 absentee ballots and 6,200 provisional ballots [remaining].
Voter Services - 15,000 Provisional Ballots are currently being processed. Ballot Distribution - 73,000 absentee ballots were mailed.
derived_estimate: partial: provisionals still out at day 8; no absentee-remaining figure

statement: Ninety-nine percent of the election results were reported at 10:30 pm on election night. There remains approximately 36,000 absentee and 8,000 provisional ballots to be counted.

The Department of Elections sent out 184,346 vote-by-mail ballots, 71,000 were delivered to the Department and of those 69,335 were accepted. 1,743 provisional ballots were received and 1,602 were accepted.
